Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Surely you do not mean that !

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Many share, erm ... une idée that uniqueness does not exist anymore, and saying anything in contraire is like being délirant.

Line.Text: But that is a stance délirant itself to have ! No one is a product of same exactement circumstances. By nature, everyone has a different story to tell.
